name: Marquette Senior Center
description: Come play pickleball at Marquette Senior Center in Marquette, MI! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Northern Michigan University Peif Building
description: Northern Michigan University Peif Building is a place to play pickleball in Marquette, MI. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Republic/Michigamme School
description: Come play pickleball at Republic/Michigamme School in Republic, MI! There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Sands Township Hall
description: Sands Township Hall is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Marquette, MI. There are 7 hard courts. 6 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Silver Creek Recreation Area
description: Silver Creek Recreation Area is a place to play pickleball in Marquette, MI. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: YMCA Of Marquette County
description: Come play pickleball at YMCA Of Marquette County in Marquette, MI! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights.
